case_title: URIBE, LAURA et al vs. DELMAR, DESHON GREEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF URIBE, LAURA URIBE, SABRINA AS TO DEFENDANT DELMAR, DESHON GREEN ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR CORP. DOES 1 TO 50 STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-08-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-03-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-21-1998
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-15-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-15-1998, OFF CALENDAR DEC 15,1998 POS OSC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-08-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY BRAIN R DINDAY HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF BRIAN R. DINDAY IN RESPONSE TO OSC RE: SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF URIBE, LAURA URIBE, SABRINA

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-17-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY BRIAN R DINDAY. HEARING SET FOR APR-07-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-07-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT OR DEFAULT JUDGMT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLFT'S ATTY DINDAY, BRIAN R, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-22-1999 CONTINUED FROM APR-07-1999 TO MAY-26-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF URIBE, LAURA URIBE, SABRINA

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-26-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-26-1999, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY BRIAN R DINDAY, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-10-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAY-26-1999 TO JUL-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF URIBE, LAURA URIBE, SABRINA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
